properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're my shelter From my enemies My defender Lord, You fight for me So I know, yes I know, yes I know, yeah You're everything I need

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You're my promise When I cannot see My protection You're watching over me So I know, yes I know, yes I know You're everything need

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Our love keeps growing I'm blessed in knowing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’ve got something that the world ain’t got I’ve got something that the world can never stop I got You I got You I got You, Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You’re my portion Making me complete My redemption Your blood has ransomed me So I know, yes I know, yes I know You’re everything I need

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: What if I could lead you to a love you never felt before? What if I could show you that He's right here waiting? What if I could guarantee He's everything you need? Would you believe me, believe me, yeah?
